message:
fix(deploy): add vercel.json to configure monorepo build

Vercel was running bun install from repo root instead of apps/web.
This config directs it to the correct directory.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+{
+  "$schema": "https://openapi.vercel.sh/vercel.json",
+  "framework": "nextjs",
+  "buildCommand": "cd apps/web && bun install && bun run build",
+  "installCommand": "cd apps/web && bun install",
+  "outputDirectory": "apps/web/.next"
+}
